list.name: Changes
list.comment: Start working on tests. Controller tests are fully covered

task.summary: Implementation of user management and improvements to the platform’s email services
Implementation of password recovery, personal data editing, and other minor improvements
Implementation of the Notifications feature and partial implementation of the logic to extend course access after the access period expires.
Extend functionality for new course creation
A few minor functional improvements too
Redesign of the “All Modules” tab too
Improved visual appearance of the course card. Added background customization
Functional improvements to the Notifications tab
Role-based access implementation and numerous minor improvements
Implementation of “version control” for Course entities
Implemented functionality for submitting a request from the user role to the admin role. Also included minor improvements
Implementation of multilingual support (Ukrainian, English, German)
Implemented infinite scrolling and pagination. Moved sorting and search logic to the backend

MESSAGE.value: Implementation of the Notifications feature and partial implementation of the logic to extend course access after the access period expires.
Extend functionality for new course creation
A few minor functional improvements too
Redesign of the “All Modules” tab too
Improved visual appearance of the course card. Added background customization
Functional improvements to the Notifications tab
Role-based access implementation and numerous minor improvements
Implementation of “version control” for Course entities
Implemented functionality for submitting a request from the user role to the admin role. Also included minor improvements
Implementation of multilingual support (Ukrainian, English, German)
Implemented infinite scrolling and pagination. Moved sorting and search logic to the backend
Start working on tests. Controller tests are fully covered

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Start working on tests. Controller tests are fully covered
